milestone: Phases 2-4 — Publish, Registry refresh, and Studio boot wiring
slice: Builder Publish (Official + Personal) now calls the real Supabase repository client; ThemeRegistry.refreshFromRepository() discovers/loads themes from every repository at boot; js/app.js awaits it with a bounded timeout before Creation Flow starts; fixed a real config-path resolution bug that broke Builder's Publish under Studio's own supabase-config.json
